name: Remote Management Service Connected to lsass Pipe
notes: This rule triggers when a remote management service is connected to lsass pipe.
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event QID is one of the following (5001837) PipeEvent (Pipe Connected)
when the event matches Process Name IMATCHES '((psexesvc)|(wsmprovhost)|(wmiprvse))\.exe' AQL filter query
when the event matches Pipe Name = 'lsass' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Remote Management Service Connected to lsass Pipe on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event QID is one of the following (5001837) PipeEvent (Pipe Connected)
AND when the event matches Process Name IMATCHES '((psexesvc)|(wsmprovhost)|(wmiprvse))\.exe' AQL filter query
AND when the event matches Pipe Name = 'lsass' AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Detected a Remoting Service Connected to lsass Pipe
Event description: Detected a Remoting Service Connected to ;sass Pipe
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
